minecraft:animals_bred.name: Animals Bred
minecraft:animals_bred.description: The number of times the player bred two mobs.

minecraft:aviate_one_cm.name: Distance by Elytra
minecraft:aviate_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled by elytra.

minecraft:bell_ring.name: Bells Rung
minecraft:bell_ring.description: The number of times the player has rung a bell.

minecraft:boat_one_cm.name: Distance by Boat
minecraft:boat_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled by boats.

minecraft:clean_armor.name: Armor Pieces Cleaned
minecraft:clean_armor.description: The number of dyed leather armors washed with a cauldron.

minecraft:clean_banner.name: Banners Cleaned
minecraft:clean_banner.description: The number of banner patterns washed with a cauldron.

minecraft:clean_shulker_box.name: Shulker Boxes Cleaned
minecraft:clean_shulker_box.description: The number of times the player has washed a shulker box with a cauldron.

minecraft:climb_one_cm.name: Distance Climbed
minecraft:climb_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled up ladders or vines.

minecraft:crouch_one_cm.name: Distance Crouched
minecraft:crouch_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled while sneaking and not in water.

minecraft:damage_absorbed.name: Damage Absorbed
minecraft:damage_absorbed.description: The amount of damage the player has absorbed in tenths of 1HP (♥).

minecraft:damage_blocked_by_shield.name: Damage Blocked By Shield
minecraft:damage_blocked_by_shield.description: The amount of damage the player has blocked with a shield in tenths of 1HP (♥).

minecraft:damage_dealt.name: Damage Dealt
minecraft:damage_dealt.description: The amount of damage the player has dealt in tenths of 1HP (♥). Includes only melee attacks.

minecraft:damage_dealt_absorbed.name: Damage Dealt (Absorbed)
minecraft:damage_dealt_absorbed.description: The amount of damage the player has dealt that was absorbed, in tenths of 1HP (♥).

minecraft:damage_dealt_resisted.name: Damage Dealt (Resisted)
minecraft:damage_dealt_resisted.description: The amount of damage the player has dealt that was resisted, in tenths of 1HP (♥).

minecraft:damage_resisted.name: Damage Resisted
minecraft:damage_resisted.description: The amount of damage the player has resisted in tenths of 1HP (♥).

minecraft:damage_taken.name: Damage Taken
minecraft:damage_taken.description: The amount of damage the player has taken in tenths of 1HP (♥).

minecraft:deaths.name: Number of Deaths
minecraft:deaths.description: The number of times the player died.

minecraft:drop.name: Items Dropped
minecraft:drop.description: The number of items dropped. This does not include items dropped upon death. Stacked blocks count as 1.

minecraft:eat_cake_slice.name: Cake Slices Eaten
minecraft:eat_cake_slice.description: The number of cake slices eaten.

minecraft:fall_one_cm.name: Distance Fallen
minecraft:fall_one_cm.description: The total distance fallen, excluding jumping. If the player falls more than one block, the entire jump is counted.

minecraft:fill_cauldron.name: Cauldrons Filled
minecraft:fill_cauldron.description: The number of times the player filled cauldrons with water buckets.

minecraft:fly_one_cm.name: Distance Flown
minecraft:fly_one_cm.description: Distance traveled upward and forward at the same time, while more than one block above the ground.

minecraft:happy_ghast_one_cm.name: Distance by Happy Ghast
minecraft:happy_ghast_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled by happy ghasts.

minecraft:horse_one_cm.name: Distance by Horse
minecraft:horse_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled by horses.

minecraft:inspect_dispenser.name: Dispensers Searched
minecraft:inspect_dispenser.description: The number of times interacted with dispensers.

minecraft:inspect_dropper.name: Droppers Searched
minecraft:inspect_dropper.description: The number of times interacted with droppers.

minecraft:inspect_hopper.name: Hoppers Searched
minecraft:inspect_hopper.description: The number of times interacted with hoppers.

minecraft:interact_with_anvil.name: Interactions with Anvil
minecraft:interact_with_anvil.description: The number of times interacted with anvils.

minecraft:interact_with_beacon.name: Interactions with Beacon
minecraft:interact_with_beacon.description: The number of times interacted with beacons.

minecraft:interact_with_blast_furnace.name: Interactions with Blast Furnace
minecraft:interact_with_blast_furnace.description: The number of times interacted with blast furnaces.

minecraft:interact_with_brewingstand.name: Interactions with Brewing Stand
minecraft:interact_with_brewingstand.description: The number of times interacted with brewing stands.

minecraft:interact_with_campfire.name: Interactions with Campfire
minecraft:interact_with_campfire.description: The number of times interacted with campfires.

minecraft:interact_with_cartography_tabl.name: Interactions with Cartography Table
minecraft:interact_with_cartography_tabl.description: The number of times interacted with cartography tables.

minecraft:interact_with_crafting_table.name: Interactions with Crafting Table
minecraft:interact_with_crafting_table.description: The number of times interacted with crafting tables.

minecraft:interact_with_furnace.name: Interactions with Furnace
minecraft:interact_with_furnace.description: The number of times interacted with furnaces.

minecraft:interact_with_grindstone.name: Interactions with Grindstone
minecraft:interact_with_grindstone.description: The number of times interacted with grindstones.

minecraft:interact_with_lectern.name: Interactions with Lectern
minecraft:interact_with_lectern.description: The number of times interacted with lecterns.

minecraft:interact_with_loom.name: Interactions with Loom
minecraft:interact_with_loom.description: The number of times interacted with looms.

minecraft:interact_with_smithing_table.name: Interactions with Smithing Table
minecraft:interact_with_smithing_table.description: The number of times interacted with smithing tables.

minecraft:interact_with_smoker.name: Interactions with Smoker
minecraft:interact_with_smoker.description: The number of times interacted with smokers.

minecraft:interact_with_stonecutter.name: Interactions with Stonecutter
minecraft:interact_with_stonecutter.description: The number of times interacted with stonecutters.

minecraft:jump.name: Jumps
minecraft:jump.description: The total number of jumps performed.

minecraft:leave_game.name: Games Quit
minecraft:leave_game.description: The number of times "Save and quit to title" has been clicked. Does not count crashes.

minecraft:minecart_one_cm.name: Distance by Minecart
minecraft:minecart_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled by minecarts.

minecraft:mob_kills.name: Mob Kills
minecraft:mob_kills.description: The number of mobs the player killed.

minecraft:nautilus_one_cm.name: Distance by Nautilus
minecraft:nautilus_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled by nautiluss.

minecraft:open_barrel.name: Barrels Opened
minecraft:open_barrel.description: The number of times the player has opened a barrel.

minecraft:open_chest.name: Chests Opened
minecraft:open_chest.description: The number of times the player opened chests.

minecraft:open_enderchest.name: Ender Chests Opened
minecraft:open_enderchest.description: The number of times the player opened ender chests.

minecraft:open_shulker_box.name: Shulker Boxes Opened
minecraft:open_shulker_box.description: The number of times the player has opened a shulker box.

minecraft:pig_one_cm.name: Distance by Pig
minecraft:pig_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled by pigs via saddles.

minecraft:play_noteblock.name: Note Blocks Played
minecraft:play_noteblock.description: The number of note blocks hit.

minecraft:play_record.name: Music Discs Played
minecraft:play_record.description: The number of music discs played on a jukebox.

minecraft:play_time.name: Time Played
minecraft:play_time.description: The total amount of time played (tracked in ticks). If the game is paused, counting does not continue.

minecraft:player_kills.name: Player Kills
minecraft:player_kills.description: The number of players the player killed. Indirect kills do not count.

minecraft:pot_flower.name: Plants Potted
minecraft:pot_flower.description: The number of plants potted onto flower pots.

minecraft:raid_trigger.name: Raids Triggered
minecraft:raid_trigger.description: The number of times the player has triggered a raid.

minecraft:raid_win.name: Raids Won
minecraft:raid_win.description: The number of times the player has won a raid.

minecraft:sleep_in_bed.name: Times Slept in a Bed
minecraft:sleep_in_bed.description: The number of times the player has slept in a bed.

minecraft:sneak_time.name: Sneak Time
minecraft:sneak_time.description: The time the player has held down the sneak button (tracked in ticks).

minecraft:strider_one_cm.name: Distance by Strider
minecraft:strider_one_cm.description: The total distance traveled by striders via saddles.

minecraft:swim_one_cm.name: Distance Swum
minecraft:swim_one_cm.description: The total distance covered with sprint-swimming.

minecraft:talked_to_villager.name: Talked to Villagers
minecraft:talked_to_villager.description: The number of times interacted with villagers (opened the trading GUI).

minecraft:target_hit.name: Targets Hit
minecraft:target_hit.description: The number of times the player has shot a target block.

minecraft:time_since_death.name: Time Since Last Death
minecraft:time_since_death.description: The time since the player's last death (tracked in ticks).

minecraft:time_since_rest.name: Time Since Last Rest
minecraft:time_since_rest.description: The time since the player's last rest (tracked in ticks). If this value is greater than 1.00h (3 days ingame), phantoms can spawn.

minecraft:total_world_time.name: Time with World Open
minecraft:total_world_time.description: The total amount of time the world was opened (tracked in ticks). Unlike Play Time, if the game is paused this number continues to increase, but it does not change visually while the statistics menu is open.

minecraft:traded_with_villager.name: Traded with Villagers
minecraft:traded_with_villager.description: The number of times traded with villagers.

minecraft:trigger_trapped_chest.name: Trapped Chests Triggered
minecraft:trigger_trapped_chest.description: The number of times the player opened trapped chests.

minecraft:tune_noteblock.name: Note Blocks Tuned
minecraft:tune_noteblock.description: The number of times interacted with note blocks.

minecraft:use_cauldron.name: Water Taken from Cauldron
minecraft:use_cauldron.description: The number of times the player took water from cauldrons with glass bottles.

minecraft:walk_on_water_one_cm.name: Distance Walked on Water
minecraft:walk_on_water_one_cm.description: The total distance covered in any direction while the player's head is not underwater.

minecraft:walk_under_water_one_cm.name: Distance Walked under Water
minecraft:walk_under_water_one_cm.description: The total distance covered in any direction while the player's head is underwater.
